title: Async Operation State Management with Request IDs
essence: Request ID pattern and abort controllers to prevent race conditions in async operations
steps: Implement request ID counters for async operations
Check request validity before state updates
Cancel pending operations on new requests
Add loading state management per operation
tradeoffs: Additional state to manage and track
rollback: Allow multiple concurrent operations without cancellation

evidence.notes: Prevents UI inconsistencies and improves user experience during rapid interactions
